examples: Standing on the tarmac were two American planes.
Three planes were standing on the tarmac, waiting to take off.
This reminds me unpleasantly of Sunnyhill School in Streatham, with its harsh tarmac, where I used to hang about in corners fantasising about wildlife.
The pink-suited lady follows at a neat trot, her heels click-clacking across the tarmac.
Remember when Senator Dole left his staff on the tarmac in Iowa or wherever it was?
